description: A SolveSpace file 'divider.slvs' is already open in the application. This is a parametric part file from the official SolveSpace tutorial (a wooden box divider panel, which may include 2D sketches and 3D extrude groups). Export the 2D sketch view of this part to DXF format (AutoCAD 2007) and save it to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/divider.dxf.
